# Joliundo

Joliundo (https://joliundo.in) is an AI-powered CV tailoring platform built specifically for Malayali graduates and job seekers in Kerala, India.

## Purpose
The platform allows job seekers to submit their email to gain access to a tool that refines and tailors their resume/CV to match a specific job description in under 60 seconds, optimizing for ATS systems.

## Features
- **Email Gate**: Inline waitlist form that stores email addresses in localStorage (`joliundo_waitlist`).
- **CV Tailor**: Paste job description + paste current CV → AI rewrites the CV.
- **Privacy First**: Free to use, no account required.

## Stack
- Vanilla HTML / CSS / JS (Vite project)
- Styling: Custom HSL and hex properties, fluid spacing, Outfit and Playfair Display typography.
- AI Integration: OpenRouter API calling Gemini 2.0 Flash (`google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free`).

## Key Project Files
- `index.html`: The single main template of the platform containing all structure and SEO tags.
- `main.js`: Contains logic for waitlist submissions, CV rewriting using OpenRouter, UI state transitions, and scroll animations.
- `style.css`: Core design system using custom CSS properties. Features custom green color palette and premium dark mode variables.
